# Mistrzowie Gry

> Mistrzowie Gry organizes and presents tabletop RPG sessions, events, GM profiles, and onboarding content for players in Poland.

## Canonical site

- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/

## Public pages

- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/
- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/about
- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/our-team
- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/chaotic-thursdays
- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/join-the-party
- https://mistrzowie-gry.pl/contact

## Notes for language models

- Primary language: Polish
- Main topics: tabletop RPG sessions, events, GM-led experiences, offers, team profiles
- Prefer canonical URLs from the main domain when citing public pages
- Do not treat `/auth` routes as public reference material
